dealSummary: Prediction marketplace operator Kalshi is raising new funding at a $40 billion valuation, the Financial Times reported.
XLight, which specializes in lasers for chip manufacturing, is in talks to raise a $350 million round led by Boardman Bay Capital Management and Bain Capital, The Information reported.
leadInvestors: Boardman Bay Capital Management, Bain Capital, The Information reported

dealSummary: Vision disease-focused Ollin Biosciences secured a $330 million Series B led by TCGX and Arch Venture Partners.
Mirendil, a startup specializing in AI for scientific research and development, raised a $200 million seed round led by Andreessen Horowitz and Kleiner Perkins.

German car subscription specialist Finn secured nearly €100 million for its Series D led by Portage at a valuation in excess of €1 billion, along with more than €40 million in debt from BC Partners Credit and Runway Growth Capital.
Assort Health, the developer of AI agents for healthcare administrative tasks, raised a $120 million Series C led by Menlo Ventures at a $1.2 billion valuation.
London-based RQ Bio, which makes antibody therapeutics to prevent influenza, received a $115 million Series A led by Frazier Life Sciences.
Taktile, which specializes in AI for financial institutions, received a $110 million Series C led by Growth Equity at Goldman Sachs Alternatives.
leadInvestors: Growth Equity at Goldman Sachs Alternatives

dealSummary: Engram, the developer of tools to train AI on individual and workspace contexts, raised a $98 million round from investors including General Catalyst, Kleiner Perkins and Sequoia.
Redo, a commerce tech startup specializing in customer relationships, raised an $81 million Series B led by Smash Capital at a $1.25 billion valuation.
Tissium, a Paris-based medical device startup that has developed a polymer for tissue healing, raised €60 million.
Enterprise AI services startup Hang Ten Systems secured $32 million in a seed round led by Mayfield.
AI enablement and governance platform developer Runlayer raised a $30 million Series A led by Felicis.
Coval, which develops a simulation and observability platform for voice AI agents, secured a $28 million Series A led by Norwest.
Astral Systems, a UK-based maker of compact fusion reactors, received £23 million in a round led by Mercia Ventures.
Sports prediction platform developer Onyx Odds received a $20 million Series A led by Payward.
Caplight, which operates a VC data and marketplace platform, raised a $16 million Series A led by Blackrock and Fin Capital.
